choices.text: Server-side: SIWS (Sign-In With Solana) verifies signature → backend checks on-chain balance → grants session. Client-only gating bypassable by editing UI. Continuously re-verify; locked staking prevents flash-borrow attacks.

questions.explanation: SIWS + backend balance check = secure gating.

choices.text: Program constraint: #[account(constraint = user_token.amount > 0)] on instruction. Program rejects call if user doesn't hold tokens. Trustless gating; users can't bypass.
